install.notes: Run npm install, then npm run doctor.

prisma.notes: Run npm run prisma:generate and npm run prisma:migrate -- --name wave5_phase1j_runtime_bug_fix_pack.

seed.notes: Run npm run db:seed twice to confirm idempotent seed behaviour.

runtime.notes: Run npm run dev and open http://localhost:3000.

auth.notes: Validate login with owner@invyra.local and seeded password.

roles.notes: Run npm run verify:seeded-roles and confirm Staff cannot access admin surfaces.

environments.notes: Validate LIVE/TRAINING/TEST availability and environment switch audit logging.

devices.notes: Validate activation code generation, device activation, suspend, and retire paths.

licensing.notes: Validate demo license, module entitlements, and consumption endpoint.

audit.notes: Validate login/access denied/role/license/device events are visible in audit APIs.
